query:
UPDATE special_cases 
SET category = 'accident_treball'
WHERE title LIKE '%Accident de Treball%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Pluriocupació%AT%'
   OR title LIKE '%autònom%accident%'
   OR title LIKE '%TRADE%'
   OR (category IN ('pluriempleo', 'otro') AND (
       description LIKE '%accident de treball%' 
       OR description LIKE '%accidente de trabajo%'
       OR legalBasis LIKE '%AT%'
       OR title LIKE '%AT%'
   ));
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute

   OR (category IN ('pluriempleo', 'otro') AND (
